fields.name: robots
fields.label: Robots
fields.description: Index control via robots

fields.name: sku
fields.label: SKU
fields.description: Optional: Specify a product SKU for this page

fields.name: defaultSku
fields.label: Default SKU
fields.description: Optional: Specify a default product SKU if this is a template page

fields.name: urlpath
fields.label: URL Path
fields.description: URL Path of the category as defined in the catalog (not CMS)

fields.name: pageSize
fields.label: Page Size
fields.description: Number of products per page (default: 9)

fields.name: alignment
fields.label: Alignment
fields.description: Horizontal alignment of the carousel

fields.name: autoplay
fields.label: Enable Autoplay
fields.description: Automatically cycle through items every 4 seconds

fields.name: itemsMobile
fields.label: Items Per View (Mobile)
fields.description: Number of circles visible on mobile screens

fields.name: itemsTablet
fields.label: Items Per View (Tablet)
fields.description: Number of circles visible on tablet screens

fields.name: itemsDesktop
fields.label: Items Per View (Desktop)
fields.description: Number of circles visible on desktop screens

fields.name: align
fields.label: Content Alignment
fields.description: Horizontal alignment for the text and form

fields.name: backgroundColor
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: Use a named variant or override with Section Metadata for custom hex

fields.name: backgroundStyle
fields.label: Background Style
fields.description: Visual treatment layered on top of background color

fields.name: backgroundImage
fields.label: Background Image URL
fields.description: Used when Background Style is Image Wash

fields.name: buttonStyle
fields.label: Button Style
fields.description: Corner style for the sign up button

fields.name: buttonWidth
fields.label: Button Width
fields.description: Width preset for the sign up button

fields.name: density
fields.label: Spacing Density
fields.description: Adjust vertical rhythm and control height

fields.name: formGap
fields.label: Form Gap
fields.description: Horizontal gap between email field and button

fields.name: emailStyle
fields.label: Email Field Style
fields.description: Visual style for the email input field

fields.name: buttonColorEmpty
fields.label: Button Color (Empty)
fields.description: Button color before any email is entered

fields.name: buttonColorFilled
fields.label: Button Color (Filled)
fields.description: Button color after email text is entered

fields.name: fullWidth
fields.label: Full Width Background
fields.description: Expand the newsletter background band to full viewport width

fields.name: placeholder
fields.label: Placeholder Text
fields.description: The placeholder text shown in the search input

fields.name: alignment
fields.label: Alignment
fields.description: Horizontal alignment of the search bar

fields.name: resultCount
fields.label: Results Count
fields.description: Number of products to show in search results

fields.name: googleMapsApiKey
fields.label: Google Maps API Key
fields.description: API key for Maps JavaScript API and Places API (New)

fields.name: defaultView
fields.label: Default View
fields.description: Initial display layout for the store locator

fields.name: searchRadius
fields.label: Search Radius
fields.description: Default radius (set 0 for All stores)

fields.name: maxResults
fields.label: Maximum Results
fields.description: Maximum number of stores to display

fields.name: autoDetect
fields.label: Auto-Detect Location
fields.description: Automatically use browser geolocation on page load

fields.name: defaultLocation
fields.label: Default Location
fields.description: Fallback location if geolocation is denied (e.g., 'Portland, OR')

fields.name: servicesFilter
fields.label: Available Service Filters
fields.description: Services that users can filter stores by

fields.name: experienceMode
fields.label: Experience Mode
fields.description: Fast = lighter payloads; Rich = photos and reviews

fields.name: radiusPresets
fields.label: Radius Presets
fields.description: Comma-separated radius options shown in the UI (example: 0,5,10,25,50)

fields.name: units
fields.label: Distance Units
fields.description: Unit for distance display and radius filtering

fields.name: noResultsMessage
fields.label: No Results Message
fields.description: Message shown when no stores match current filters
fields.value: No stores found matching your criteria. Please try a different search or remove some filters.

fields.name: maxReviewsPerStore
fields.label: Max Reviews Per Store
fields.description: Maximum review count to render in rich details

fields.name: mapStyle
fields.label: Map Style
fields.description: Map visual style (uses configured map IDs)

fields.name: primaryCtaLabel
fields.label: Primary CTA Label
fields.description: Primary action label on store cards and info window links

fields.name: cardDensity
fields.label: Store Card Density
fields.description: Adjust card spacing for list layout

fields.name: subheading
fields.label: Subheading (leave blank to auto-generate from minimum age)

fields.name: underage-message
fields.label: Underage Message (leave blank to auto-generate from minimum age)

fields.name: legal-text
fields.label: Legal Text
fields.value: By entering this site you agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.

fields.name: hero-description
fields.label: Hero Description
fields.value: As a Platinum VIP, you get first look at our newest devices, exclusive plan upgrades, and members-only pricing before anyone else.

fields.name: perk-1-desc
fields.label: Perk 1 Desc
fields.value: New devices 48 hours before public launch

fields.name: perk-2-desc
fields.label: Perk 2 Desc
fields.value: Up to 30% off select plans and accessories

fields.name: perk-3-desc
fields.label: Perk 3 Desc
fields.value: Dedicated VIP line with zero wait times

fields.name: hero-description
fields.label: Hero Description
fields.value: Manage all 48 lines from one dashboard. Add new team members, track usage, and control costs with CitiSignal Business.

fields.name: deals-description
fields.label: Deals Description
fields.value: Exclusive offers on phones, accessories, and subscriptions. Only at CitiSignal.

fields.name: deal-1-description
fields.label: Deal 1 Description
fields.value: Stream your favorite artists with a free 90-day music subscription when you sign up for any plan.

fields.name: deal-2-title
fields.label: Deal 2 Title
fields.value: New line? New phone on us.

fields.name: deal-2-description
fields.label: Deal 2 Description
fields.value: Getting a new line? Get the latest smartphone on us with qualifying trade-in. Limited time offer.

fields.name: deal-3-description
fields.label: Deal 3 Description
fields.value: Add lines and save bigger. Our family plans give you more data and bigger discounts the more you add.

fields.name: deal-4-description
fields.label: Deal 4 Description
fields.value: Pair your new phone with a connected smartwatch. Exclusive bundle pricing for CitiSignal members.

fields.name: featured-description-1
fields.label: Featured Description 1
fields.value: Check out the latest technology with the iPhone 16. Filled with modern features like an upgraded camera and blazing speed.

fields.name: featured-description-2
fields.label: Featured Description 2
fields.value: Get the newest phone for your everyday life, now available at CitiSignal with exclusive offers for new and existing members.

fields.name: featured-feature-list
fields.label: Featured Feature List
fields.value: 48MP camera system with 5x optical zoom|A18 Pro chip for all-day performance|Titanium design, lighter than ever|Free with eligible trade-in at CitiSignal

fields.name: final-cta-body
fields.label: Final CTA Body
fields.value: Join 2.4 million people who chose better coverage and honest pricing. Setup takes five minutes.

fields.name: hero-description
fields.label: Hero Description
fields.value: Discover the expanded reach of CitiSignal's 5G network. Faster speeds, wider coverage, and smarter plans are just a click away.

fields.name: hero-visual-description
fields.label: Hero Visual Description
fields.value: 48MP camera, titanium finish, and all-day battery on CitiSignal 5G.

fields.name: hero-description
fields.label: Hero Description
fields.value: Discover the expanded reach of CitiSignal's 5G network. Faster speeds, wider coverage, and smarter plans are just a click away.

fields.name: network-description
fields.label: Network Description
fields.value: Our 5G network keeps expanding. From downtown to the suburbs, from coast to coast, CitiSignal delivers speeds and reliability you can depend on every day.

fields.name: network-stat-1-label
fields.label: Network Stat 1 Label
fields.value: Network reliability across all coverage areas, every quarter

fields.name: network-stat-3-label
fields.label: Network Stat 3 Label
fields.value: New subscribers in the last year

fields.name: plans-description
fields.label: Plans Description
fields.value: No hidden fees. No annual contracts. Switch, upgrade, or cancel anytime.

fields.name: plan-1-description
fields.label: Plan 1 Description
fields.value: Reliable coverage and solid speeds for everyday use.

fields.name: plan-1-feature-list
fields.label: Plan 1 Feature List
fields.value: 50 GB high-speed data|5G access included|Spam call blocking|5 GB mobile hotspot

fields.name: plan-2-description
fields.label: Plan 2 Description
fields.value: Our most popular plan. More data, more perks, more freedom.

fields.name: plan-2-feature-list
fields.label: Plan 2 Feature List
fields.value: Unlimited premium data|5G Ultra Wideband|25 GB hotspot|90-day free music subscription|International texting 30+ countries

fields.name: plan-3-description
fields.label: Plan 3 Description
fields.value: The complete experience. Premium everything, no compromises.

fields.name: plan-3-feature-list
fields.label: Plan 3 Feature List
fields.value: Truly unlimited everything|5G+ with priority access|Unlimited hotspot|Global roaming 60+ countries|Smartwatch bundle + device protection

fields.name: testimonial-1-quote
fields.label: Testimonial 1 Quote
fields.value: Switched from my old carrier three months ago. Better signal, better price, and the free music subscription is a nice bonus.

fields.name: testimonial-2-quote
fields.label: Testimonial 2 Quote
fields.value: The family plan saved us almost $80 a month. Four lines, unlimited data, and no surprises on the bill.

fields.name: testimonial-3-quote
fields.label: Testimonial 3 Quote
fields.value: I got the iPhone 16 deal with trade-in and it was seamless. In-store setup took ten minutes. Really impressed.

fields.name: testimonial-4-quote
fields.label: Testimonial 4 Quote
fields.value: 5G coverage at my office and at home finally. CitiSignal's network expansion has been a game changer for me.

fields.name: testimonial-5-quote
fields.label: Testimonial 5 Quote
fields.value: No contracts, no hidden fees. They actually mean it. My bill has been the exact same every month for a year.

fields.name: hero-description
fields.label: Hero Description
fields.value: Manage all 48 lines from one dashboard. Add new team members, track usage, and control costs with CitiSignal Business.

fields.name: subtitle
fields.label: Subtitle
fields.value: Every component engineered for speed, clarity, and endurance.

fields.name: stat-2-label
fields.label: Stat 2 — Label
fields.value: Advanced dual camera with Smart HDR 5

fields.name: stat-4-label
fields.label: Stat 4 — Label
fields.value: Video playback on a single charge

fields.name: review-1-title
fields.label: Review 1 — Title
fields.value: Best phone I've owned in years

fields.name: review-1-text
fields.label: Review 1 — Text
fields.value: Switched from a three-year-old phone and the difference is night and day. Camera is incredible in low light, battery easily lasts a full day, and the screen is stunning.

fields.name: review-2-text
fields.label: Review 2 — Text
fields.value: The camera is the standout feature for me — photos look professional without any editing. Battery gets me through a full work day with about 30% left.

fields.name: review-3-text
fields.label: Review 3 — Text
fields.value: Went with the Sage colorway and get compliments on it constantly. Performance-wise it handles everything I throw at it — heavy multitasking, gaming, lots of photos.

fields.name: summary
fields.label: Summary (icon image, title as H4, subtitle as paragraph)

fields.name: specs
fields.label: Spec Rows (each paragraph: bold label followed by value)

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.value: Drag to rotate. Scroll to zoom. Tap hotspots to explore every detail of the device.

fields.name: bgcolor
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: Any valid CSS color (e.g. #003087, white, rgb(0,48,135))

fields.name: text-color
fields.label: Text Color
fields.description: Any valid CSS color for all text in the banner

fields.name: logo
fields.label: Logo Image
fields.description: Select a logo from the AEM Assets repository. Banner height follows the image height.

fields.name: content
fields.label: Banner Text
fields.description: Freeform rich text — supports bold, italic, alignment, headings, and links

fields.name: sku
fields.label: Product SKU
fields.description: SKU used to fetch name, price, and description from the catalog. Not displayed on the page.

fields.name: sku
fields.label: Product SKU
fields.description: The SKU of the product to display

fields.name: background-color
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: Any valid CSS color (e.g. #003087, blue, rgb(0,48,135))

fields.name: text-color
fields.label: Text Color
fields.description: Any valid CSS color for the product name, SKU, price, and description

fields.name: bgcolor
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: Any valid CSS color (e.g. #003087, blue, rgb(0,48,135))

fields.name: text-color
fields.label: Text Color
fields.description: Any valid CSS color for the main description text

fields.name: cta-button-color
fields.label: CTA Button Color
fields.description: Any valid CSS color for the CTA button background

fields.name: cta-text-color
fields.label: CTA Button Text Color
fields.description: Any valid CSS color for the CTA button label text

fields.name: anchor-namespace
fields.label: Anchor Namespace
fields.description: Unique ID used to anchor this block on the page

fields.name: badge-label
fields.label: Badge Label
fields.description: Small pill badge displayed above the title (e.g. 'Capability Spotlight')

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Main headline text

fields.name: description-1
fields.label: Description (Primary)
fields.description: First body paragraph below the title

fields.name: description-2
fields.label: Description (Secondary)
fields.description: Optional second body paragraph

fields.name: feature-1
fields.label: Feature 1
fields.description: First bullet-point feature item

fields.name: cta-label
fields.label: CTA Button Label
fields.description: Text for the call-to-action button

fields.name: cta-url
fields.label: CTA Button URL
fields.description: Link for the call-to-action button

fields.name: background-image
fields.label: Background Image
fields.description: Optional image displayed in the media panel behind the metric cards. Select from AEM Assets.

fields.name: background-image-alt
fields.label: Background Image Alt Text
fields.description: Accessibility alt text for the background image

fields.name: card-1-value
fields.label: Metric Card 1 — Value
fields.description: Value shown in the first frosted-glass metric card (e.g. '862 Days')

fields.name: card-1-label
fields.label: Metric Card 1 — Label
fields.description: Label shown below the value in card 1 (e.g. 'Average TAT')

fields.name: backgroundColor
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: Hex color for the navigation bar background (e.g., #000000)

fields.name: textColor
fields.label: Text Color
fields.description: Hex color for the navigation text (e.g., #ffffff)

fields.name: hoverAccentColor
fields.label: Hover Accent Color
fields.description: Hex color for the hover underline accent (e.g., #fefefe)

fields.name: breadcrumb
fields.label: Breadcrumb
fields.description: Optional breadcrumb trail with links separated by >. Example: Home > Category > Page

fields.name: categoryName
fields.label: Category Name
fields.description: Top-level navigation category name (e.g., Aviation Parts)

fields.name: subLink1Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 1 Label
fields.description: Label for the first sub-navigation link

fields.name: subLink1Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 1 URL
fields.description: URL path for the first sub-navigation link (e.g., /plp/tires)

fields.name: subLink2Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 2 Label
fields.description: Label for the second sub-navigation link (optional)

fields.name: subLink2Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 2 URL
fields.description: URL path for the second sub-navigation link

fields.name: subLink3Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 3 Label
fields.description: Label for the third sub-navigation link (optional)

fields.name: subLink3Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 3 URL
fields.description: URL path for the third sub-navigation link

fields.name: subLink4Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 4 Label
fields.description: Label for the fourth sub-navigation link (optional)

fields.name: subLink4Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 4 URL
fields.description: URL path for the fourth sub-navigation link

fields.name: subLink5Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 5 Label
fields.description: Label for the fifth sub-navigation link (optional)

fields.name: subLink5Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 5 URL
fields.description: URL path for the fifth sub-navigation link

fields.name: subLink6Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 6 Label
fields.description: Label for the sixth sub-navigation link (optional)

fields.name: subLink6Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 6 URL
fields.description: URL path for the sixth sub-navigation link

fields.name: stamp-text
fields.label: Animated stamp text (use / for line breaks)

fields.name: min-weight
fields.label: Minimum weight (lbs)
fields.description: Default: 6
